sentences.target: Je cherche un jouet pour le chat.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ ʒwɛ puʁ lə ʃa/

translations.fr: Je cherche un jouet pour le chat.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ ʒwɛ puʁ lə ʃa/
translations.en: I'm looking for a toy for the cat.
translations.es: Estoy buscando un juguete para el gato.
translations.de: Ich suche ein Spielzeug für die Katze.
translations.it: Sto cercando un giocattolo per il gatto.
translations.yue: 我搵緊一個畀隻貓嘅玩具。
translations.pt: Estou procurando um brinquedo para o gato.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một món đồ chơi cho con mèo.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een speeltje voor de kat.
translations.hi: मैं बिल्ली के लिए एक खिलौना ढूँढ रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ψάχνω ένα παιχνίδι για τη γάτα.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en leke til katten.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari mainan untuk kucing.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en leksak till katten.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter et legetøj til katten.
translations.ja: 猫のおもちゃを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting the direct object 'un jouet' and followed by a beneficiary PP 'pour le chat'.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'jouet' as a non-specific referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/purpose prepositional phrase.
Definite article determiner, masculine singular; marks the noun 'chat' as specific/identifiable.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour' (beneficiary).

sentences.target: Tu ranges le jouet dans la boîte.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁɑ̃ʒ lə ʒwɛ dɑ̃ la bwat/

translations.fr: Tu ranges le jouet dans la boîte.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁɑ̃ʒ lə ʒwɛ dɑ̃ la bwat/
translations.en: You put the toy in the box.
translations.es: Guardas el juguete en la caja.
translations.de: Du legst das Spielzeug in die Kiste.
translations.it: Tu metti il giocattolo nella scatola.
translations.pt: Você coloca o brinquedo na caixa.
translations.vi: Bạn đặt món đồ chơi vào trong hộp.
translations.nl: Je legt het speeltje in de doos.
translations.hi: तुम खिलौना डिब्बे में रखते हो.
translations.id: Kamu memasukkan mainan ke dalam kotak.
translations.ja: あなたはおもちゃを箱に入れます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, with direct object 'le jouet' and a locative PP 'dans la boîte'.
Definite article determiner, masculine singular; marks 'jouet' as specific.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'ranges'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article determiner, feminine singular; marks 'boîte' as specific.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On partage le jouet avec les cousins.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁtaʒ lə ʒwɛ avɛk le kuzɛ̃/

translations.fr: On partage le jouet avec les cousins.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁtaʒ lə ʒwɛ avɛk le kuzɛ̃/
translations.en: We share the toy with the cousins.
translations.es: Compartimos el juguete con los primos.
translations.de: Wir teilen das Spielzeug mit den Cousins.
translations.it: Condividiamo il giocattolo con i cugini.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们和堂表兄弟姐妹分享这个玩具。
translations.yue: 我哋同啲堂表兄弟姊妹分享呢件玩具。
translations.ru: Мы делимся игрушкой с двоюродными братьями и сёстрами.
translations.pt: Nós compartilhamos o brinquedo com os primos.
translations.he: אנחנו משתפים את הצעצוע עם בני הדודים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chia sẻ món đồ chơi với các anh chị em họ.
translations.ar: نحن نتشارك اللعبة مع أبناء العمومة.
translations.nl: We delen het speeltje met de neven en nichten.
translations.uk: Ми ділимося іграшкою з двоюрідними братами й сестрами.
translations.hi: हम खिलौना चचेरे भाइयों और बहनों के साथ साझा करते हैं.
translations.pl: Dzielimy się zabawką z kuzynami i kuzynkami.
translations.el: Μοιραζόμαστε το παιχνίδι με τα ξαδέρφια.
translations.id: Kami berbagi mainan dengan para sepupu.
translations.cs: Sdílíme hračku s bratranci a sestřenicemi.
translations.da: Vi deler legetøjet med fætrene og kusinerne.
translations.ja: 私たちはいとこたちとそのおもちゃを分け合います。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/collective subject pronoun; takes 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular (with 'on'); transitive, with direct object 'le jouet' and comitative PP 'avec les cousins'.
Definite article determiner, masculine singular; marks 'jouet' as specific.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'partage'.
Preposition introducing a comitative phrase.
Definite article determiner, plural; marks 'cousins' as specific group.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Nous achetons un jouet pour le bébé.
sentences.reading: /nu zaʃtɔ̃ œ̃ ʒwɛ puʁ lə bebe/

translations.fr: Nous achetons un jouet pour le bébé.
translations.ipa: /nu zaʃtɔ̃ œ̃ ʒwɛ puʁ lə bebe/
translations.en: We're buying a toy for the baby.
translations.es: Estamos comprando un juguete para el bebé.
translations.de: Wir kaufen ein Spielzeug für das Baby.
translations.it: Stiamo comprando un giocattolo per il bebè.
translations.ko: 우리는 아기를 위해 장난감을 사고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在给宝宝买一个玩具。
translations.yue: 我哋買緊一件俾BB嘅玩具。
translations.pt: Estamos comprando um brinquedo para o bebê.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang mua một món đồ chơi cho em bé.
translations.nl: We kopen een speeltje voor de baby.
translations.hi: हम बच्चे के लिए एक खिलौना खरीद रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αγοράζουμε ένα παιχνίδι για το μωρό.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper en leke til babyen.
translations.id: Kami sedang membeli mainan untuk bayi.
translations.sv: Vi köper en leksak till bebisen.
translations.da: Vi køber et legetøj til babyen.
translations.ja: 私たちは赤ちゃんのためにおもちゃを買っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, with direct object 'un jouet' and beneficiary PP 'pour le bébé'.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces 'jouet' as non-specific.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'achetons'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary prepositional phrase.
Definite article determiner, masculine singular; marks 'bébé' as specific.
Common noun, grammatically masculine here, singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.
